title: Auto populate forms using data from an external system through API
excerpt: Hello, we’d like to be able to autopopulate forms based on data contained in our CRM system through an API. So when a user opens a form it’s already populated with their basic information. The user would then be able to …

posts.author: christineWorkPac (Christine Ambrus)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, we’d like to be able to autopopulate forms based on data contained in our CRM system through an API. So when a user opens a form it’s already populated with their basic information. The user would then be able to review the data and edit it if necessary

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @christineWorkPac and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, there is no way to populate a Workform via API.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: dominicw (Dominic)
posts.cookedHtml: Might be worth looking at Monday + Fillout.com - form builder that integrates natively with Monday and you can pre-fetch data from a REST API at the start of the form
